file_insights.purpose: OllamaLocalProvider implementation with TCP detection and HTTP API integration
key_functions: detect() - TcpStream::connect_timeout to localhost:11434 with 500ms timeout
fetch() - GET http://localhost:11434/api/ps to retrieve loaded models
parse_ps_response() - Parse {models: [{name, size_vram, expires_at}]} JSON structure
file_insights.critical_details: ProviderSnapshot returned with provider='ollama-local', display_name='Ollama (local)', primary_pct=None, source='http', loaded_models parsed from API response

file_insights.change: Added pub mod ollama; declaration for new OllamaLocalProvider module
file_insights.impact: Integration point for provider registry system

file_insights.change: Updated subtask-1-1 status from pending to completed, documented session timestamp and outcomes
file_insights.impact: Tracking system now reflects completion of prerequisite phase

file_insights.change: Updated to exclude credential-related files for Ollama configuration
file_insights.impact: Prevents accidental credential exposure in version control

patterns_discovered.benefit: Non-blocking detection of local services without false positives from slow responses

patterns_discovered.usage: parse_ps_response() as standalone testable function distinct from fetch()
patterns_discovered.benefit: Unit tests can validate JSON parsing independently of HTTP layer

patterns_discovered.usage: Return '(idle)' when models list is empty in loaded_models field
patterns_discovered.benefit: UI renders meaningful state even when no models are loaded

patterns_discovered.usage: Find earliest expires_at field across models array for reset_at computation
patterns_discovered.benefit: Single source of truth for provider quota reset timing

patterns_discovered.usage: primary_pct=None for local provider (quota not applicable), display loaded model names instead
patterns_discovered.benefit: Adapts display strategy per provider type without code duplication

gotchas_discovered.risk: Parsing {models: []} correctly vs. crashing on None/missing field
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Unit test parse_ps_response with empty models; return loaded_models as Option<Vec<String>> where empty vec becomes '(idle)'

gotchas_discovered.risk: If models lack expires_at, earliest-finder logic fails
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Defensive parsing with Option<i64> for expires_at per model; skip models without valid timestamp

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: 500ms timeout on connect_timeout may be too aggressive
gotchas_discovered.risk: False negatives if Ollama daemon is slow on first startup
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: No hardcoded increase in plan; observable in canary testing; adjust if failure rate >5%

gotchas_discovered.risk: Assumes /api/ps endpoint always returns same shape; Ollama version drift could break parser
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Malformed JSON test case included; production logging should capture unexpected response shapes

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Integration with ProviderSnapshot requires loaded_models field population
gotchas_discovered.risk: If subtask-1-1 (ProviderSnapshot struct extension) not fully merged, compile fails
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Dependency marked as subtask-1-1; verify loaded_models: Option<Vec<String>> exists before merge

approach_outcome.description: Created OllamaLocalProvider with complete detect() and fetch() implementation following Provider trait
approach_outcome.verification: cargo test -p bop providers::ollama -- --nocapture passes; all unit tests for parse_ps_response cover models, empty list, expires_at, and malformed JSON cases
approach_outcome.next_dependency: subtask-2-2 (OllamaCloudProvider) can proceed; subtask-4-1 (registration in all_providers) depends on both Ollama subtasks complete

recommendations.action: Verify subtask-1-1 loaded_models field fully integrated
recommendations.reason: ollama.rs build depends on ProviderSnapshot struct having loaded_models: Option<Vec<String>> with correct serde attributes

recommendations.action: Add integration test spawning mock Ollama HTTP server on 11434
recommendations.reason: Current unit tests cover parsing only; live endpoint behavior (timeouts, malformed responses) untested
recommendations.timing: Optional for this subtask; critical for subtask-2-2 (cloud variant)

recommendations.action: Document Ollama API response shape expectations
recommendations.reason: parse_ps_response assumes {models: [{name, size_vram, expires_at}]}; if Ollama version drifts, parser breaks silently
recommendations.timing: Add as inline comment in parse_ps_response with example JSON response

recommendations.reason: Hardcoded timeout may need tuning based on user environment (VMs, slow disks); makes debugging difficult
recommendations.timing: Can be added in subtask-2-2 or future refactor if canary data shows timeout collisions

recommendations.reason: If expires_at parsing fails on a model, it's silently skipped; diagnostics would help troubleshooting
recommendations.timing: Optional enhancement post-subtask-2-1; defer to quotability debugging phase

recommendations.action: Add human-readable error message for TCP connection failure
recommendations.reason: Current timeout error may confuse users unsure if Ollama is installed or just not listening
recommendations.timing: Polish item; defer to UX refinement phase
